headline: 3 Big Reasons WRB Should Be On Your Watchlist
summary: Over the past six months, W. R. Berkley’s shares (currently trading at $66.20) have posted a disappointing 8.8% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 3.9% gain. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
